content:
🔥 oh-my-claudecode | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable developers to efficiently use and manage multiple AI agents within the Claude Code environment for automated code generation and complex task completion without requiring extensive setup or learning.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code • Zero learning curve for users • Intuitive CLI commands and in-session skills
📖 Summary: Oh-my-claudecode is a TypeScript-based tool that orchestrates multiple AI agents for Claude Code, aiming to simplify complex coding tasks. It provides a zero-learning-curve experience for users, allowing them to leverage advanced AI capabilities for code generation and automation through intuitive commands and workflows.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
